---
name: Claim a Lecture Scribe Slot
about: Use this template to claim an upcoming lecture date to type up notes.
title: "[CLAIM]: Lecture XX (MM/DD)"
labels: scribe-claimed
assignees: []
---

### Scribe Information
* **Names**: Your Names Go Here
* **GitHub Usernames**: @yourusernames

### Lecture Details
* **Lecture Number**: (e.g., Lecture 5)
* **Date of Lecture**: (e.g., May 27)

### Commitments
- [ ] I confirm I will submit a Pull Request with complete, cleanly typeset notes by the end of the week of this lecture.
- [ ] I have verified that this lecture date matches our class calendar (Wednesdays and Thursdays).
- [ ] I will write my notes directly inside the assigned `lecture-XX.tex` file within its corresponding week folder.
